title: Should the US impose a teen social media ban like the UK?
summary_full: The UK is enforcing a social media ban for children under the age of 16. The BBC asked Americans of different ages if they thought it was a good idea.
summary_public: The UK is enforcing a social media ban for children under the age of 16. The BBC asked Americans of different ages if they thought it was a good idea.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: UK is enforcing a social media ban for children under the age of 16
